description: The method carries interim guidance for a periodic and end-of-build fresh-context self-review that drives the app against its acceptance criteria to catch the defect classes green test suites miss, honestly scoped as a stopgap until the independent verification gate exists.
iWant: the build to include a periodic fresh look that actually drives the app against what it is supposed to do
soThat: defects my passing tests miss are caught before I rely on the result
title: Interim self-review guidance

acceptanceCriteria.description: The guidance describes a periodic and end-of-build fresh-context self-review dispatch
acceptanceCriteria.then: it describes a fresh-context manual-review subagent dispatch run periodically (every few FBS builds) and once at the end of the build

acceptanceCriteria.description: The reviewer drives the app against the acceptance criteria rather than reading the code
acceptanceCriteria.when: it states what the reviewer does
acceptanceCriteria.then: it requires the reviewer to drive the running application against its acceptance criteria, not to read the code

acceptanceCriteria.description: The review targets the named defect classes
acceptanceCriteria.when: it states what the review looks for
acceptanceCriteria.then: it names the target defect classes: session-class bugs, false-promise UI, runtime mismatch (localhost versus deployed), dead auth paths and dead code

acceptanceCriteria.description: The guidance scopes the self-review honestly as an interim stopgap and not the independent gate
acceptanceCriteria.then: it states plainly that this is interim guidance until rcf-verify-lite exists, is guidance and not a new subsystem, and is not the independent verification gate
